ValidationRule.description: This prevents Refional Forecast owners from editing SIOP types other than Regional Ask
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND( TEXT(Type__c) <> "Region Ask-Orders" , TEXT(Type__c) <> "Region Ask-Shipment" , NOT( $Permission.C_PERM_4000_SIOP_Edit_All_Types )
)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_SIOP_Data_002: You do not have the permission to edit types other than Region Ask. Only SIOP OTR and GCE can edit the other types.
